week_theme: 梅雨の晴れ間 — 贈る言葉、温める距離

trend_analysis.season: 梅雨入り直前〜梅雨序盤
trend_analysis.target_psychology: 梅雨の重さで鬱々としがちな時期に、ちょうどいい言葉で背中を押したい・気持ちを整えたい層

sales_text.title_ja: きょうも、そのままで ③
sales_text.description_ja: 梅雨の重さも、忙しい毎日も、あなたを丸ごと肯定する24のことば。Cocoとしらたま・しずく・ひよりが、ちょうどいい距離で気持ちを届けます。日常・仕事・大切な人へ。
sales_text.description_en: 24 soft-spoken stamps for rainy days, busy mornings, and quiet moments. Coco, Shiratama, Shizuku & Hiyori gently hold your everyday feelings — for work, love, and everyone in between.

stamps.coco_type: フェミニンビューティー
stamps.outfit: パジャマ①：セージグリーン綿パジャマ（白い紫陽花プリント衿）
stamps.analysis: 最高頻度の朝挨拶スタンプ。梅雨の朝の爽やかさを窓辺の光と雨粒で表現。パジャマ×鳥の組み合わせで起き抜けの温もりを演出し、恋愛・家族・友人すべてに使える万能設計。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, sage green and warm white morning palette, diffused early morning light quality, gentle ink bleeding effect on paper
stamps.prompt_character: Coco, elegant 41-year-old Japanese woman with refined bob haircut slightly tousled from sleep (feminine beauty type), wearing sage green cotton pajamas with white hydrangea collar print, sparkling warm eyes just waking up with soft morning gleam, gentle sleepy smile full of warmth; small white fluffy bird Hiyori perched on nearby windowsill with tiny wing sparkles, peering in cheerfully; soft rain drops visible on glass window behind in blurred watercolor wash, bust-up portrait composition, upper area left as generous copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『おはよう』naturally written in upper portion of illustration in warm charcoal ink brush style, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression

stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）ひより：三日月の上でくつろぎ
stamps.analysis: 夜の挨拶は使用頻度が安定して高い。恋愛・友人間の両方で使えるオールシーン対応。梅雨の夜の静けさ＋三日月＋ひよりの眠る姿で癒し保存率を高める。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, hydrangea blue and soft lavender night sky palette, dreamy atmospheric watercolor wash, hand-painted texture suggesting moonlit quietude
stamps.prompt_character: Hiyori, a small round fluffy white bird, peacefully sleeping curled in a ball on a softly glowing crescent moon, tiny eyes gently closed with contented smile expression, delicate wing tucked under chin, surrounded by scattered glowing star-like rain drops transformed into soft firefly lights, full body visible from side angle, lower right corner as copy space, dreamy and peaceful composition
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『おやすみ〜』naturally placed in upper left portion with slight diagonal tilt suggesting drifting to sleep, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes closed in peaceful sleep, soft moonlight reflection

stamps.text: 今日も素敵ないちにちになりますように
stamps.coco_type: フェミニンビューティー
stamps.outfit: お散歩着①：ダスティブルーのリネンサンドレス（ウィッカーバッグ）
stamps.analysis: 朝の祝福メッセージとして、仕事・プライベート双方で使える万能スタンプ。梅雨の合間の晴れ間のような温かさを紫陽花とリネン素材で表現。親から子・友人間・職場どこでも対応。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, dusty blue and sage green morning outdoor palette, gentle morning light, soft watercolor wash background with hydrangea flowers blooming at edges
stamps.prompt_character: Coco, elegant Japanese woman with refined bob hair (feminine beauty type), wearing dusty blue linen sundress with small wicker shoulder bag, standing with arms slightly spread open in welcoming blessing gesture radiating morning warmth, warm sparkling eyes and peaceful smile; small sleek black cat Shiratama sitting at her feet looking up adoringly with bright curious eyes, surrounded by soft-focused purple and blue hydrangea flowers at bottom edges, gentle dappled morning light from left side, bust-up to waist composition
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『今日も素敵ないちにちになりますように』in thin graceful brush style naturally placed in upper area, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze

stamps.text: 笑顔溢れるいちにちになりますように
stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）ひより：朝の風に乗って飛翔
stamps.analysis: #3のひよりバージョン。対になるデザインで両方購入を促進する設計。明るく動きのある構図で保存率・使用率が高い。梅雨の朝に送りたい応援メッセージ。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, warm sunrise gradient palette in cream and soft gold, cheerful and bright atmosphere, loose watercolor strokes suggesting morning wind motion
stamps.prompt_character: Hiyori small white fluffy bird in dynamic mid-flight pose with wings spread wide, carrying a tiny glowing golden lantern in beak, surrounded by softly swirling hydrangea petals and gold sparkle dust caught in morning breeze, looking forward with bright joyful sparkling eyes, full body view from slightly below angle emphasizing flight, right side of frame as generous copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『笑顔溢れるいちにちになりますように』naturally placed along left side in gentle vertical arrangement, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, bright and hopeful expression

stamps.coco_type: フェミニンビューティー
stamps.outfit: 部屋着①：ウォームクリームのオーバーサイズニットカーディガン＋アイボリーワイドパンツ
stamps.analysis: 父の日（6月21日）需要を見込む感謝系スタンプ。家族・パートナー・友人すべてに対応。ニット素材の温もりと鳥が届ける手紙の演出で保存・転送率を最大化。
stamps.scene_context: 日常・家族・愛する人
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, warm cream and soft gold gratitude palette, intimate indoor afternoon light, gentle texture suggesting handknit fabric warmth
stamps.prompt_character: Coco, elegant woman with refined bob hair (feminine beauty type), wearing warm cream oversized knit cardigan with ivory wide lounge pants, seated at small wooden table with hands resting gently on surface, looking forward with deeply warm sparkling eyes and grateful soft smile; small white bird Hiyori arriving from right side carrying a miniature envelope with tiny heart wax seal, wings creating gentle air movement with soft sparkle trail, close-up to bust portrait with left side copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『いつもありがとう』naturally placed in left upper area in warm heartfelt ink style, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze

stamps.coco_type: フェミニンビューティー
stamps.outfit: パジャマ②：ラベンダーシルクタッチパジャマ（サテンリボン衿）
stamps.analysis: 愛情表現の定番スタンプ。恋愛・家族・親友すべてに使える汎用性が高い。ラベンダー×黒猫の癒し感でマインドフルネス・淡色ジャンル層に強く訴求。梅雨の夕暮れに送りたくなる温もり設計。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, lavender and soft pink love palette, dreamy indoor evening atmosphere, watercolor blush effect on characters creating warm glow
stamps.prompt_character: Coco wearing lavender silk-touch pajamas with small satin ribbon bow at collar (feminine beauty type), sitting cross-legged facing slightly left with warm glowing expression and soft loving eyes, right hand gently placed over heart; small sleek black cat Shiratama sitting beside her with rose-tinted watercolor blush cheeks and bright warm eyes looking at viewer, tiny softly glowing heart floating between them, both surrounded by lavender-pink watercolor cloud aura, lower area as copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『大好き』in large warm flowing script naturally placed in upper center area, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression

stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）ひより：玄関先で見送り
stamps.analysis: 梅雨の外出が増える6月に需要急増する見送り・心配スタンプ。恋愛・家族・友人間すべてで使える。透明傘と玄関先の設定で季節感を強化し、購入動機につなげる。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, warm amber indoor light against cool rainy blue exterior, doorway atmosphere suggesting safe heartfelt departure
stamps.prompt_character: Hiyori small white fluffy bird standing at a sketched doorframe threshold, one wing raised in gentle farewell wave with deeply caring and warm expression, bright sparkling eyes full of concern and affection looking toward viewer as if watching someone leave safely, small transparent clear umbrella leaning against door edge nearby, soft warm interior amber light creating gentle halo glow on bird's white feathers, left side frame as generous copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『気をつけてね』naturally placed in right upper portion in warm gentle brush style, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes

stamps.coco_type: フェミニンビューティー
stamps.outfit: 普段着①：ミントグリーンのリネンシャツ＋ホワイトワイドパンツ
stamps.analysis: 久しぶりの連絡にも日常の気遣いにも使えるオールマイティスタンプ。梅雨の蒸し暑さで体調を気にし始める時期に需要増。Cocoの肩から顔を出すしらたまの構図で一度見たら忘れられないキャッチーさを演出。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, mint green and fresh white casual palette, casual outdoor afternoon light, loose relaxed watercolor strokes with friendly energy
stamps.prompt_character: Coco in mint green linen shirt and white wide-leg pants (feminine beauty type), leaning slightly forward with curious gentle expression and head tilted slightly to one side, sparkling friendly warm eyes; small sleek black cat Shiratama peeking mischievously from behind her shoulder with one small paw resting on her sleeve and bright curious eyes peeking into view, both looking directly at viewer, hydrangea leaf accents in lower corner as seasonal accent, bust-up to waist composition
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『元気？』in casual friendly brush style placed in upper portion, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze

stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）しずく：雨の中をゆっくり歩く
stamps.analysis: 梅雨の鬱々とした気分への励ましスタンプ。マインドフルネス・水彩・淡色ジャンルで保存率が最も高い一言。しずく（亀）のゆっくり歩くイメージと哲学的に一致。上半期疲れが出る6月初旬に刺さる。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, sage green and soft earth tone rainy day palette, gentle perseverance mood, loose watercolor puddle reflections with tender atmosphere
stamps.prompt_character: Shizuku, a small realistic watercolor-style tortoise with a vibrant flower blooming on top of shell painted with detailed watercolor texture, walking steadily and slowly through light rain, each tiny footstep leaving a small warm glowing impression in soft earth, steady focused gentle expression with warm encouraging eyes looking slightly forward, full body side profile view with slight upward gaze suggesting inner strength, right side as generous copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『少しずつでいい』naturally placed in right side area beside the walking turtle in warm encouraging brush style, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes

stamps.outfit: オフィスカジュアル①：パールホワイトブラウス＋ネイビーワイドテーラードパンツ
stamps.analysis: 仕事の背中押しスタンプ。上半期終わり・下半期スタートの6月に特需。オフィスカジュアルで職場感を演出しつつ鳥のGOサインで可愛さも確保。SNS投稿とあわせた宣伝効果で購買率を高める。
stamps.scene_psychology: 励まし・モチベーション
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, clean pearl white and soft navy motivational palette, bright and determined indoor morning light, crisp clean watercolor lines with forward energy
stamps.prompt_character: Coco in pearl white blouse and navy tailored wide-leg pants (cool beauty type with refined composed expression), standing upright with light fist raised gently at shoulder height in motivating gesture, determined yet soft sparkling eyes with cheerful encouraging smile, professional posture with feminine grace; small white bird Hiyori flying dynamically beside her carrying a tiny handmade banner in beak, full body to waist composition with clean sage green potted plant in background right side
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『やってみよう』in bold encouraging brush style naturally placed in upper portion, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, bright and hopeful expression

stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）しらたま：興奮して飛び上がる
stamps.analysis: 待ち合わせ前・イベント前・週末前に使いたい高頻度スタンプ。梅雨明けを待つワクワク感、父の日のお楽しみにもフィット。しらたまの表情豊かなリアクションで共感を得やすい。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, warm coral and soft gold anticipation palette, joyful playful energy with happy motion lines, loose expressive watercolor
stamps.prompt_character: Shiratama, sleek black cat with realistic watercolor-style fur texture, caught mid-jump with both paws raised excitedly upward, wide sparkling eyes with large bright pupils showing pure excitement and joy, tiny pastel rain boot visible near feet suggesting an upcoming rainy-day adventure, soft confetti-like hydrangea petals swirling around in the air creating celebratory atmosphere, dynamic full-body diagonal composition, lower left corner as copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『楽しみ〜』in bouncy playful script naturally placed in upper right area, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, bright and hopeful expression

stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）しらたま：紫陽花を耳に挿して上品に
stamps.analysis: フォーマル寄りの感謝・喜びスタンプ。仕事・プライベート両方に使える。「嬉しい」より少し丁寧な表現でCoco世界観の「品のある温もり」と統一。水彩ブラッシュ表現でSNS映えを狙う。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, soft cream and lavender appreciation palette, gentle warm indoor glow, delicate watercolor blush effect on character
stamps.prompt_character: Shiratama black cat sitting neatly and elegantly with paws placed together in front, rosy warm glowing watercolor blush on cheeks, gentle closed-eye happy smile with small sparkle at corner of eye, tiny blue hydrangea flower tucked behind left ear as delicate seasonal accessory, understated and refined composition with upper area as generous copy space, bust-up portrait view
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『嬉しいです』in delicate neat brush style naturally placed in upper portion, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes implied in gentle closed expression, soft warm light

stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）しずく：のんびりと受け入れポーズ
stamps.analysis: 「許容する」「流す」場面で使えるマインドフルネス系スタンプ。梅雨のじめじめした不満をすっと受け流す哲学がしずくの性格に合致。職場・友人間の日常会話で重宝される。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, muted sage and warm cream acceptance palette, relaxed and philosophical mood, loose casual watercolor strokes with serene atmosphere
stamps.prompt_character: Shizuku tortoise with flower on shell, shell tilted gently to one side in a relaxed shrug-like pose suggesting acceptance, one small flipper raised slightly in easy going gesture, warm gentle half-smile expressing serene philosophical acceptance, a tiny rain drop nearby that has formed a small cheerful smiley face shape on a leaf, right side as generous copy space, slightly looking toward viewer with calm wise eyes
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『まぁいいんじゃない』naturally placed in left side area in slightly loose and casual lettering style, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes

stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）しらたま：思慮深く耳を傾ける
stamps.analysis: 会話の相槌・レスポンスとして使用頻度が最も高い部類のスタンプ。スタンプセットに必ず欲しい一枚。梅雨の曇り空パレットで「聴いてる感」を出し、共感保存率を高める。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, soft blue-grey overcast day palette, thoughtful contemplative mood, subtle rainy day atmosphere in loose watercolor wash
stamps.prompt_character: Shiratama black cat with head tilted gently to one side in thoughtful attentive listening posture, one small paw raised slightly to chin in considering gesture, ears perked forward attentively, large warm eyes with soft thoughtful light suggesting genuine interest and careful attention, gazing slightly upward to right as if listening and processing what was said, lower portion as generous copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『そうなんだ』in gentle medium-weight conversational brush naturally placed in lower portion, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes

stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）しずく：虹を見上げる
stamps.analysis: 励ましスタンプの中でも共感保存率が高い。上半期振り返りシーズンの6月に特に刺さる言葉。しずく（思考系）が語りかける信頼感で、深い共感を生む。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, rainbow and soft gold breakthrough palette, tender quiet celebratory mood, loose hopeful watercolor wash with gentle light rays
stamps.prompt_character: Shizuku tortoise looking upward at a tiny delicate rainbow forming in a rain puddle reflection beneath their feet, flower on shell glowing softly with warm light as if freshly blooming in response to achievement, gentle upward gaze full of quiet pride and warm recognition, small gold sparkle at the tip of rainbow arc, peaceful full-body forward-facing view with slight upward tilt, left side as generous copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『一歩成長だね』naturally placed in right area beside or above the turtle in warm affirming brush style, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze

stamps.text: 失敗のない人会ったことないよ
stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）しらたま：夜に寄り添う
stamps.analysis: 長めのセリフだが心に深く刺さるため保存・転送率が高い。梅雨のじめじめ気分・上半期落ち込み期の「特効薬的スタンプ」。夜の共感シーンで使われることが多い。深夜の送信率が高い設計。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, warm candlelight amber and deep indigo night palette, intimate late-night comforting mood, soft luminous glow emanating from character
stamps.prompt_character: Shiratama black cat sitting with a contemplative yet comforting presence, looking directly at viewer with extraordinarily deep warm sparkling eyes full of compassion and deep understanding as if to say 'I understand you', tiny transparent umbrella sheltering the cat in gentle rain suggesting protection offered to the viewer, warm amber candlelight glow illuminating fur texture from lower left creating soft warmth, full-body intimate close composition, bottom area as copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『失敗のない人会ったことないよ』in warm conversational intimate brush style in upper portion, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression

stamps.outfit: 普段着②：紫陽花パープルのコットンマキシワンピース
stamps.analysis: 背中を押す・次の行動を促す決断スタンプ。仕事・恋愛の意思決定シーンで重宝。Cocoのクールビューティーとしらたまの「で？」感が合体した、このブランドならではのスタンプ。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, hydrangea purple and deep navy assertive palette, confident indoor studio portrait quality, clean focused watercolor lines
stamps.prompt_character: Coco in hydrangea purple cotton maxi dress (cool beauty type with calm assertive expression), standing with arms lightly folded at waist level, one elegant brow slightly raised in questioning pose demanding gentle yet firm response, clear direct sparkling eyes radiating quiet confidence and care; small sleek black cat Shiratama sitting beside her with alert forward-leaning posture and bright attentive eyes also looking at viewer, clean simple background with subtle hydrangea petal texture, centered composition
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『で、どうする？』in clean confident brush naturally placed in upper portion, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes

stamps.text: やってみないとわからないよ
stamps.coco_type: フェミニンビューティー
stamps.outfit: お散歩着②：ダスティローズの軽トレンチコート（クリアアンブレラ持ち）
stamps.analysis: #10「やってみよう」と対になるスタンプ。悩んでいる相手への背中押しに特化。梅雨の外出着コーデとクリアアンブレラで季節感を強化。しずくの「ゆっくりでも進める」哲学が言葉を後押し。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, dusty rose and fresh sage rainy outdoor palette, encouraging movement atmosphere, soft rain wash watercolor blur in background
stamps.prompt_character: Coco in dusty rose light trench-style coat with small bow at waist (feminine beauty type), holding a clear transparent umbrella in one hand with open encouraging expression and sparkling reassuring eyes; small realistic watercolor tortoise Shizuku peeking out from under edge of umbrella with tiny encouraging smile and warm eyes, light rain visible in soft blurred background, first hydrangeas of early summer season just beginning to bloom in background lower corner
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『やってみないとわからないよ』in warm encouraging brush style in upper area, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, bright and hopeful expression

stamps.text: ご連絡ありがとうございます
stamps.outfit: オフィスカジュアル②：セージグリーンシルクブラウス＋クリームタイトスカート
stamps.analysis: ビジネス用スタンプ需要は季節を問わず安定。品の良い水彩スタンプとして差別化できる。コーポレート層・フリーランス・士業層にリーチ。しずくの几帳面なお辞儀姿が信頼感を演出。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, sage green and cream refined professional palette, elegant indoor lighting suggesting polished workspace, clean watercolor lines with subtle elegance
stamps.prompt_character: Coco in sage green silk blouse with cream pencil skirt (cool beauty type with composed professional expression), performing a graceful slight bow with straight back and warm eyes visible in bow gesture, elegantly professional yet warm; small realistic watercolor tortoise Shizuku beside her also performing a tiny bow with shell tilting forward respectfully, subtle sage leaf accents in background lower corners, clean centered professional composition
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『ご連絡ありがとうございます』in neat formal yet warm brush style naturally placed in upper area, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes

stamps.text: よろしくお願いいたします
stamps.outfit: オフィスカジュアル③：アイボリーシルクタートルネック＋キャメルクロップドブレザー
stamps.analysis: 最頻出ビジネス表現。高品質な水彩スタンプとして「スタンプで印象を上げたい」購買動機に直結。#19とセット使いを想定した設計。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, ivory and warm camel professional palette, elegant clean interior light suggesting confidence and reliability, precise refined watercolor rendering
stamps.prompt_character: Coco in ivory silk turtleneck and camel cropped fitted blazer (cool beauty type), standing upright with elegant slight bow, hands neatly clasped together at waist in formal yet warm gesture, composed professional expression with warm sparkling eyes, radiating trustworthiness and warmth simultaneously; small realistic watercolor tortoise Shizuku beside her holding a tiny spiral notebook pad in flippers with focused attentive expression, left side as generous copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『よろしくお願いいたします』in refined neat calligraphic brush style in upper left area, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze

stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）しずく：紫陽花の花束を乗せてじっと待つ
stamps.analysis: ビジネス・待ち合わせ両方に使える丁寧な表現。しずく（亀）のゆっくり待つイメージが完璧にハマる設計。梅雨の午後の窓辺という設定で季節感も担保。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, dusty mauve and soft cream patient waiting palette, quiet afternoon window light atmosphere, gentle textured watercolor paper feeling
stamps.prompt_character: Shizuku tortoise sitting perfectly still and patiently with a small gathered bouquet of blue and purple hydrangea flowers balanced gently on top of shell, patient warm smile expression with softly gleaming eyes looking forward contentedly, afternoon filtered light through suggested window casting soft gentle shadows, right side as generous copy space, full front-facing view showing patient stance
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『お待ちしております』in neat warm professional brush style naturally placed in left area, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes

stamps.text: ご無沙汰しております
stamps.outfit: （キャラクターのみ）ひより：古い手紙を届けてきた旅から
stamps.analysis: 久しぶりの連絡スタンプ。梅雨の季節に「そういえば最近連絡してないな」という心理に刺さる。ひよりの「ふと思い出した・届けにきた」直感型キャラクターとの相性が抜群。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, nostalgic blue-lavender faded distance palette, gently aged vintage paper atmosphere, soft nostalgic watercolor wash suggesting time passed
stamps.prompt_character: Hiyori small white fluffy bird holding a vintage-style envelope letter with elegant wax seal in beak, expression of gentle shy warmth looking slightly down then up in a reconnecting greeting gesture, surrounded by softly falling blue and lavender hydrangea petals drifting as if from a long journey, soft nostalgic blue-lavender background atmosphere, full body slightly angled composition, upper portion as copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『ご無沙汰しております』in slightly formal yet warm graceful brush style in lower portion, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes

stamps.text: 思い出してくださり、嬉しいです
stamps.coco_type: フェミニンビューティー
stamps.outfit: お出掛け着①：ソフトコーラルのフラワープリントブラウス＋ホワイトワイドリネンパンツ
stamps.analysis: 「思い出してくれた」という喜びを丁寧に伝えるスタンプ。ご無沙汰の返信・急な連絡への応答として使える。コーラル×ひよりの温もりで感情を細やかに届ける設計。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, soft coral and warm white nostalgic warmth palette, touched and moved indoor afternoon light, emotional watercolor bloom effect radiating from characters
stamps.prompt_character: Coco in soft coral floral-print blouse and white wide linen pants (feminine beauty type), hand gently placed over heart in genuinely moved grateful gesture, eyes softly bright with touched warmth and a bright smile; small white bird Hiyori landed on her shoulder whispering warmly into ear as if delivering a cherished message, surrounded by soft glowing golden aura suggesting a warm memory resurfacing, close portrait composition from bust up with left side copy space
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『思い出してくださり、嬉しいです』in warm touched sincere brush style naturally placed in upper left area, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze

stamps.characters: Coco × しらたま × しずく × ひより
stamps.coco_type: フェミニンビューティー
stamps.outfit: お出掛け着②：シャンパンゴールドのプリーツミディドレス（フローラルヘッドクラウン）
stamps.analysis: セットの集大成スタンプ。全キャラクターが揃うことでシリーズの世界観を一枚で表現。誕生日スタンプは年中使われる安定需要。父の日・梅雨明けパーティーとの時期的シナジーも高い。
stamps.prompt_style: soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, champagne gold and soft rainbow celebration palette, joyful festive atmosphere with gentle watercolor confetti and sparkle, warmest and most luminous composition in the series
stamps.prompt_character: Coco in champagne pleated midi dress with delicate floral crown headband (feminine beauty type), arms open wide in joyful celebratory embrace gesture, sparkling excited eyes and bright open smile; small sleek black cat Shiratama holding a tiny birthday cake with candle beside her, realistic watercolor tortoise Shizuku with flower blooming on shell wearing a small paper party hat, white fluffy bird Hiyori carrying a golden star ribbon banner in beak flying overhead, all four gathered together in festive joyful formation, soft golden glow and pastel confetti surrounding the group
stamps.prompt_text_size: handwritten-style Japanese text 『お誕生日おめでとう』in joyful celebratory brush style naturally placed in upper area with small star and sparkle accents, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, bright and hopeful expression
